summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin panel new features for Addrika e-commerce platform. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Admin login with password 110078, dark mode styling with readable text across all tabs, Purge All button visible in Orders, Settings tab with Change PIN feature, and purge endpoints for discounts/coupon usage.

1_admin_login_new_password.details: Admin login works with email contact.us@centraders.com and PIN 110078. Backend API test confirmed successful login returns session_token and is_admin=true.

2_dark_mode_text_readability.details: All admin dashboard tabs have readable text in dark mode. CSS overrides in index.css (lines 216-363) properly set contrast colors for: table headers (slate-700/50), text (slate-200/300/400), badges, inputs, modals, and cards.

3_revenue_tracking.details: Revenue shows ₹409.46 from paid orders. Backend stats endpoint aggregates orders with payment_status='paid' or 'completed' correctly.

4_purge_all_orders_button.details: Purge All button (data-testid='purge-all-orders-btn') is visible in Orders tab when orders exist. Red color with trash icon. Requires typing 'PURGE_ALL_ORDERS' to confirm.

5_discount_codes_purge.details: DELETE /api/admin/discount-codes/purge/all endpoint works. Requires confirmation body {"confirm": "PURGE_ALL_DISCOUNTS"}. Returns deleted_codes count and deleted_archives count.

6_coupon_usage_purge.details: DELETE /api/admin/discount-code-usage/purge/all endpoint works. Requires confirmation body {"confirm": "PURGE_ALL_USAGE"}. Also resets times_used counter on all discount codes.

7_admin_password_change.details: POST /api/admin/change-password endpoint works. Validates: current password, password mismatch, min 4 chars, not same as current. Frontend Settings tab has 'Change PIN' button.

8_inquiry_email_notification.details: POST /api/inquiries creates inquiry and triggers send_admin_inquiry_notification() via BackgroundTasks. Uses Resend API configured with RESEND_API_KEY. Email sent to NOTIFICATION_EMAIL.

9_settings_tab_change_pin.details: Settings tab shows 'Change Admin PIN' section with description 'Update your admin login PIN' and 'Change PIN' button. Dark mode styling properly applied.

backend_api_tests.test_get_admin_stats: PASSED - Returns orders, revenue, users, inquiries stats
backend_api_tests.test_change_password_wrong_current: PASSED - Returns 401 for wrong current password
backend_api_tests.test_get_inquiries: PASSED - Returns inquiries array and total

critical_code_review_comments: Dark mode CSS overrides in index.css are comprehensive (lines 216-363) covering tables, inputs, badges, and modals
Revenue calculation correctly filters by payment_status in ['paid', 'completed'] in admin.py line 149-153
Purge endpoints require explicit confirmation strings preventing accidental data loss
Email notification uses BackgroundTasks for non-blocking execution
seed_data_creation: Created test inquiry via API for testing email notification. One test order exists in database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new admin features working correctly. Admin password is 110078. Dark mode CSS fixes are in index.css lines 216-363. Settings tab has Change PIN feature. Purge endpoints for discounts and coupon usage require specific confirmation strings. Email notifications use Resend API.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working as expected. No issues found during testing.
